Collection of my notes, ideas, thoughts, experiences, and reflections.

Quotes

“You will never know how much it cost my generation to preserve your freedom. I hope you will make good use of it.” - John Adams

“Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.” - Marie Curie

“Always stand on principle even if you stand alone.” - John Adams

“It is impossible to conquer a nation that is determined to be free.” - Thomas Paine

“There is nothing more unequal than equal treatment of unequal people.” - Thomas Jefferson

“Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.” - Arthur C. Clarke

“Not all knowledge needs to be useful; it’s okay to pursue knowledge for pure pleasure, just like art or music.” - Walter Isaacson, in the book “Leonardo Da Vinci”

“The illiterates of the 21st century will not be those who cannot read and write, but those who cannot learn, unlearn, and relearn.” - Alvin Toffler

“The farther back you can look, the farther forward you are likely to see.” - Winston Churchill

“If you think education is expensive, try ignorance.” - Jeff Rich

“Always use the word ‘impossible’ with the greatest caution.” - Wernher Von Braun

“One good test is worth a thousand expert opinions.” - Wernher Von Braun

“Research is what I’m doing when I don’t know what I’m doing.” - Wernher Von Braun

“Teachers should prepare the student for the student’s future, not for the teacher’s past.” - Richard Hamming

“If you are not paying for the product, then you are the product.” - Andrew Lewis

“I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it. The brave man is not he who does not feel afraid, but he who conquers that fear.” - Nelson Mandela
